COURSE WORKBOOK
with Gretta Van Riel, Rob Ward, Chase Dimond
Richard Li, Nick Shackelford
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

As we’ve previously learned, you would need to work
with dozens if not hundreds of micro-influencers to
get the same reach as one macro influencer. That’s
why in the next two lessons, you’ll learn how to
manage working with hundreds of micro-influencers.
This is important because working with micro-
influencers at scale costs less and creates a
compounding effect for your audience as if everyone
has your product. So your goal here will be to target
50-100 send-outs a month for the next three months.
Working with Micro-Influencers at Scale
• 	Step 1: Create a new instagram account
• 	Step 2: Follow 100-1000 micro influencers from
the new account
• 	Step 3: Hire a Virtual Assistant (VA) to reach out
to each influencer
• 	Step 4: Engage with the influencer’s profile
• 	Step 5: Send a follow-up message
LESSON:
SCALING MICRO-
INFLUENCERS
MODULE:

MARKETING
ACTION ITEMS
❏ 	Use the template in the Resources to create a
